query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `terms_acceptance` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `terms_version` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `accepted_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `ip_address` varchar(45),
  `user_agent` text,
  CONSTRAINT `terms_acceptance_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `user_id_idx` (`user_id`),
  INDEX `version_idx` (`terms_version`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user qcNV4qQD7qpkaJ4.fb5a500c82ee --database APFRAaBLqYVeRNQZ9fu2LF --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `terms_acceptance` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `terms_version` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `accepted_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `ip_address` varchar(45),
  `user_agent` text,
  CONSTRAINT `terms_acceptance_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `user_id_idx` (`user_id`),
  INDEX `version_idx` (`terms_version`)
);
